game.title: Too Strong For Space
game.short_text: A fast-paced, overpowered arcade defense game

details.title: Too Strong For Space
details.description:
UPDATE 1:
- 2 NEW MODALITIES
- 1 NEW LEADERBOARD
- 2 NEW ABILITIES
- 1 NEW WEAPON
- 3 NEW SKINS
- YOU CAN NOW SKIP TUTORIAL (USEFUL IF IT BUGS)
- QOL IMPROVEMENTS
- MINOR MENU UI ADJUSTMENT
- SOME BALANCING
- LOTS OF BUG FIXED

🎮 Too Strong for Space
When a sneeze becomes a weapon of mass destruction.
Earth is under attack. Legions of alien robots are descending from the skies… but you're ready.
Not because you have an army.
Not because you have a plan.
But because you’re ridiculously powerful.
Take control of the planet’s last (and most absurd) defender: a hero who summons black holes, sneezes away enemies, and turns every wave into a galactic massacre.
💥 Key Features:
Overpowered Defense: you take no damage, only deal destruction. The more you kill, the stronger you become.Combo & Progression: every wave unlocks a crazier weapon or ability.Choose Your Power: after each wave, pick one of several upgrades to customize your unstoppable build.Galactic Sneeze: charge it by killing and wipe the screen in one blast.Endless Mode: survive beyond wave 11, where the alien swarm never ends.Global Leaderboard: show the world just how unfairly strong you are.Run-based Tasks: every match gives you 3 unique missions. Complete them for extra rewards and bragging rights.Style Shop: unlock skins for both your hero and the planet Earth; because even destruction should look good.
GAME REALIZED FOR THE BIG GAME JAM #7 IN 8 DAYS

Pirate Kings : Clash of the tides

Game made for GDevelop Game Jam 7.  Theme was Overpowered.
 
Defeat enemy ships and collect their treasures. Use your spoils at the tavern to buy potions that will grant you more superpowers !
Complete 5 levels and fight the boss if you Dare!
Gameplay
Use your left and right arrow keys to turn.
Aim with your mouse, and shoot with the left click button.
Hold the left mouse button to build up charge
You can slow down time for a while using your right mouse button.
Shoot barrels to explode them.

game.title: Oni-Powered
game.short_text: Oni-Powered is a turn-based roguelike strategy game.

details.title: Oni-Powered
details.description:
Oni-Powered is a turn-based roguelike strategy game made for the GDevelop BIG Game Jam #7You wield the Blade of the Oni-Slayer, a weapon of unparalleled power. It's the only thing that can strike down the Oni demon, and with it, any foe falls in a single, decisive blow.
Objective: You play as a samurai descending into a dungeon to reclaim haunted Oni mask and expel the daemon possessing it. Each level presents a small, hexagonally-tiled arena filled with demonic enemies and lava pits. Your primary goal is to reach the exit (stairs) to proceed to the next level, either by defeating or expertly evading enemies.Turn-Based Combat: Every action you take consumes a turn, and then all enemies on the floor take their actions. This makes every move count and encourages careful planning. There's no time limit on your turns, allowing you to strategize at your own pace.
Attacks:
you can stab enemies that are adjacent to you.


you can lunge at enemies one tile away.


you can throw a shuriken at enemies


Altar: you can acquire upgrades by praying at altars


Enemies:
Kyūso: Will relentlessly move one tile towards you each turn

Demon Archer: Ranged attack, skilled with arrows.

Akame: Ranged attack, shoots fireball.

Demon Demolitionist: Bomb-throwing demon

Heikegani: summon waves of fire

Oni mask demon


Good luck & have fun

A game created for GDevelop BIG Game Jam #7.

Ashbringer is a short game focused on exploration and the control of an overwhelming power that threatens to burn everything in your path.Break the curse of fire by finding the three divine favors without burning the village and claim your freedom!
How to play ?Move: Arrow keysControl your fire: Hold SpacebarExplore the village to find the three divine favors


Roadmap (Post-Jam Plans)
Mechanics
Replace the HP system with a Karma bar (Good ↔ Evil)Unlock two different endings based on Karma balanceEach favor collected reduces Evil Karma
Visuals & Assets
Add more villagers (to make the village feel alive)Expand the map for better explorationAdd wall shadows for improved depth and atmosphereCreate wall variations (different textures, colors, etc.)Add new village elements (wells, carts, signs, furniture, etc.)

details.title: Overtitans: Destroyers of Worlds
details.description:
Overtitans: Destroyers of Worlds
Made in 9 days for GDevelop BIG Game Jam #7 by a two-person team: TheAvIGOLD & Jurfix

About lore
The Legion of Darkness won the Great War. Worlds fell one by one, and in each conquered land, they left behind their enforcers - Titans, ancient giants known only as the Destroyers of Worlds.
 
You are one of the last mages of light. A member of a secret order that uncovered a long-lost branch of forbidden magic, said to have the power to kill Titans… and everything else around them.
 
The world is already broken. But in your hands lies unchecked power that might restore it or finish what the Titans started.


Overpowered by Design
Overtitans is an experimental action game where you create your own spells by combining runes. Each combination unleashes a different type of destruction from focused beams to chaotic explosions. Stack more runes to amplify the power... at the risk of losing control.
 
No cooldowns. No safety. Just raw magic and your will to use it.

Face Titans. Shape the battlefield. Discover secrets.
The world is fragile. Your magic breaks it. Some say defeating a Titan reveals something never seen before. But legends are often born from fire.

game.short_text: Making Man’s Mind Manipulate Matter!
game.title: Kinesis

details.title: Kinesis
details.description:
Game Controls
WASD movementShift to sprintLeft click to select objectRight click to stop object[E] for superpower[space] for punch [P] to pause
Download Kinesis!
Download and play Kinesis offline as an app!Ad-free play,All for only a dollar!
Welcome to Kinesis Labs.
Ever wanted to manipulate matter by the sheer might of your mind?
You, the only surviving test subject, have woken up with the power of telekinesis... isolated in the middle of a gigantic complex known as Kinesis Labs.
In other words, nothing – and no one – can stop you. You start by smashing glass bottles and exploding barrels. With focus and persistent training, you hone your skills. You will stop bullets. You will create black holes. In due time, the very scientists who created you shall shudder before the reach of your powers!
At each succeeding level,  you will face new and more deadly enemies. You will need all of your newfound strengths to survive your foes and make your way out of the labyrinthine laboratory.
Features:
Data is saved to an account!A shop to buy costumes, etc!A community level editor!
Made for the Gdevelop Game Jam 7...
...over nine days and many many hours for each of that nine days!
RATED 12TH PLACE IN 357 GAMES!

game.title: Space Whale
game.short_text: swim through the vast and starry (and blindingly bright) space

details.title: Space Whale
details.description:
Known Glitch: depending on your browser and/or device, the games audio may not work as intended,

I've tested the game with chrome and firefox in both windows and android, and safari on ios (using my 2nd gen SE) most of them just had a initial delay at the start due to still loading the audio, while in safari the adaptive music was broken and sound effects wouldn't play

however I still can't garuante the game audio will work on your end even if you're on a browser that worked for me, so check the gameplay video for reference on how the music and sound effects should ideally be playing

---You're a whale swiming through space and feasting on yummy red, blue and purple stars! but be careful, not only are there astewwoids in your way, but your view may get covered by strong colored light waves 
Move Left and Right by dragging your Finger or Mouse Cursor (holding left click), if you  let go, the player will snap back to the center

Try getting as many stars as you can without getting hit by astewwoids, when a light wave comes by, the star whose colors matches the wave will give way more points than usual! 

---
This game was made for the GDevelop BIG Game Jam #7, based on the theme "overpowered"
while it def was my first thought, I tried thinking of a interpretation that wasn't just "something very very strong, what I landed on was "overpowering" in a sensory(?) kind of meaning, like a speaker playing music so loud that it "overpowers" any other sound
Initially my way about doing this was gonna be making a basic scoring game, who's background and music would get progressively more elaborate and trippy to the point it would distract from the game, with a "falling through space" aesthetic
but due to me being rather low energy during the jam period, and also just being a lil rusty making games, I simplified the idea and game more, and the direction went from intense "falling through space" to a more serene "swimming through space" 
I'm particularly happy with how I handled the music and sound design here, I feel the BGM turned out very nice, and I had fun making the variants for when each colored waves come by. 
The sound effects especially, instead of using the engine's pitch tool, I recorded each variant of the sound so that the pitch is always in key with the BGM
more than anything I'm just happy to get to make a lil game again, its been a while... c^^

game.title: The Power of Friendship
game.short_text: A game where you play with your friendship bracelet's beads to make friends that'll help you along the way :3

details.title: The Power of Friendship
details.description:
Published on GD Gameshttps://gd.games/niustudios/thepoweroffriendship
In "The Power of Friendship" you get to play against your colleagues in school with your friendship bracelets. Each person gets 5 beads with random stats (points and level) that you can later level up and trade. The objective of the game is to battle, get better beads, and make friends that will help you if you befriend them with:
THE POWER OF FRIENDSHIP

P.S. the Power of Friendship is very OP :3
HOW TO PLAY:

Controls: Mouse
Credits:
Jéssica Correia: The masoquist who tried programming a whole game in a week while working a full-time job, for the first time. Also part of the game design team in charge of the calculations and math envolving mechanics.
Nádia Correia: The delusional and maximalist artist that can't leave a pixel empty. Also part of the game design team. Also went deaf making the music and sound design.
Bruna Costa: The game design council and the much needed EMOTIONAL SUPPORT.
Future Plans:
- Add Rarities (beads will be able to get multiple colors to better the chance of winning against the opponent's color)
- Add Abilities (some beads will have special abilities like "play an extra bead" to score more points or "if this bead loses, the opponent doesn't get a point on the score". Abilities will have the base version and a leveled up version).
- Add a Collection (for the player to keep all the different beads they've collected).
- Add MORE Beads
- Add a Settings Menu (change the volume for music and sound effects, or turn them off).
- Add Animations (buttons popping up, transitions scenes, etc).
- Add a 3-phase boss battle (against 2 teachers and then against the people you didn't befriend along the way all together c: ).
- Add Benefits for how many Friends you have (if you have 2 friends you get +5 points in one bead, if you have 3 you get 1 level for 1 bead, if you have 4 you get one more bead space, etc).
- Add Dialogs (simple ones like "what are you looking for'" in the trade, for example).
- Make Improvements in the Scoring and Trading sytems.

details.title: Iron Will
details.description:
Hello there! We're thrilled to introduce our latest prototype, Iron Will, created for the 7th GDevelop Big Game Jam 2025. The theme was Overpowered.
 
Take on the role of a lone dwarf battling a massive octopus (LOTR fans here!!! :D). Destroy its tentacles to charge your OVERPOWER gauge and unleash damage upon the BOSS.
 
Controls
Arrow Keys – Move
A – Attack
Space – Jump
Ctrl – Dash
About Us
 
We’re five0nine.studio, an indie duo passionate about creating immersive experiences.
As always, my wife poured her artistic vision into crafting the hand-drawn assets and all the frame-by-frame animations, while I battled the code to bring this prototype to life. Debugging remains an eternal struggle, but the challenge is what makes game dev fun, right? :...)
We’d love for you to play Iron Will and share your thoughts! Every bit of feedback is invaluable.We hope you enjoy this prototype as much as we enjoyed making it!
